evidence.model_version_sha_note: artifact_sha is NULL for all champion models in model_registry. No Wave-5-specific SHA registered. domainAnalysis.version = 'domain-analysis-v1.0.0' is uniform across all 10,830 picks — no version discriminator between pre/post Wave-5.
evidence.devig_baseline_definition: Picks created before 2026-06-01 with metadata.deviggingResult present and settled_at non-null. 86 graded picks, 85/86 has_edge=false.
evidence.note: INSUFFICIENT VOLUME FOR STATISTICAL EDGE CLAIM. All 503 graded post-Wave-5 picks with devig data have sport_id=NULL, indicating a synthetic/smoke-test corpus (event names contain 'db-smoke-utv2-996'). The pipeline did not produce real production picks with the new stat-model path during this window — Wave-5 code is merged but the champion models in model_registry remain 'v0.1-baseline-2026-04-22' with artifact_sha=NULL. No CLV or edge advantage can be claimed from this data. This evidence bundle documents the current DB state honestly. A follow-up evidence collection pass is required once real production picks accumulate under the Wave-5 path.
